fields.title: Persistence: replace mutable let with Ref
fields.description: persistence.ts uses let snapshot with manual get/set. Replacing with Ref requires all consumers (footer render, prompt-modes pi callbacks) to be inside Effect context. Since they are sync callbacks registered with the pi API, this requires migrating consumers to Effect-native patterns first. Defer until prompt-modes and footer are fully Effect-native.
fields.close_reason: Replaced mutable let snapshot with Ref.make in PersistenceLive. Reads use Ref.getUnsafe (sync, safe in any context). Writes use Effect.runSync(Ref.set/update/updateAndGet). All 53 tests pass.
